analysis.summary: Release 2025.8 focuses on security enhancements, reporting capabilities, and system reliability. This release includes a major security feature (MFA), new user functionality (export reports), critical bug fixes, and performance improvements.
analysis.excludedReason: Technical tasks and deployment operations excluded as they do not directly affect customer experience.

features.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
features.description: Users can now enable multi-factor authentication using email verification.
features.customerImpact: Enhanced security with multi-factor authentication for user accounts

features.title: Export Dashboard Reports
features.description: Users can export dashboard reports to PDF format.
features.customerImpact: New capability to export and share dashboard reports for offline access and documentation

enhancements.title: Improved Search Performance
enhancements.description: Reduced search response times across the portal.
enhancements.customerImpact: Faster search results improving user productivity and experience

bugFixes.title: Password Reset Email Failure
bugFixes.description: Resolved an issue where password reset emails were not sent to some users.
bugFixes.customerImpact: Critical fix restoring account recovery functionality for affected users

bugFixes.title: Duplicate Notifications
bugFixes.description: Fixed an issue causing duplicate notifications to be displayed.
bugFixes.customerImpact: Resolved notification delivery issue improving user experience

excludedItems.title: Database Index Optimization
excludedItems.reason: Internal optimization with no direct customer impact

excludedItems.title: Upgrade Logging Framework
excludedItems.reason: Internal infrastructure change with no direct customer impact

excludedItems.title: Production Deployment
excludedItems.reason: Operational activity, not a customer-facing change
